footer.address: Block Protocol L.L.C-FZ Meydan Grandstand, 6th floor, Meydan Road, Nad AlSheba, Dubai, U.A.E.
footer.description: Seek Protocol is a next-gen platform developed by Block Protocol L.L.C-FZ, combining augmented reality, AI, and blockchain to create real-world gamified experiences.

home.heroSubtitle: The first AR and AI platform on Solana that transforms your world into a blockchain-powered playground. Hunt for airdrops, collect NFTs, and explore with AI companions in real locations. Transform your surroundings into a playground of crypto airdrops, NFTs, AI companions, and immersive AR experiences.
home.benefitARDesc: Transform any location into an interactive treasure hunt with AR technology that brings digital assets to life.
home.benefitSeekToEarnDesc: Convert your daily movement into rewards. Every step, run, and adventure leads to airdrops and other hidden treasures.
home.benefitLiveEventsDesc: Join real-world gatherings enhanced with AR rewards, from local meetups to massive city-wide treasure hunts.
home.benefitCreatorToolsDesc: Our drag & drop tool empowers anyone to deploy AR campaigns, distribute NFTs, tokens, and assets and engage audiences at scale.
home.benefitGeofencingDesc: Precise GPS-based asset placement with 30-meter accuracy, enabling location-verified rewards and experiences.
home.benefitQuestsDesc: Dynamic missions that adapt to your location, skill level, and preferences with escalating rewards and challenges.
home.futureTitle: The future of location based interactions
home.futureDesc: Experience the revolutionary convergence of key technologies. Each innovation seamlessly integrates to transform your physical world into a gamified earning ecosystem where every step has value, every location holds potential, and every adventure rewards you with real digital assets
home.serviceLocationAirdropsDesc: Geofencing technology enables precise placement of digital assets at specific GPS coordinates. From city centers to hidden gems, every location becomes a potential reward zone. Exclusive NFTs, token airdrops, and limited collectibles await discovery.
home.serviceImmersiveARDesc: Experience next-generation augmented reality that seamlessly blends digital assets with your physical environment. Our advanced AR engine delivers stunning 3D visualizations, real-time environmental mapping, and persistent world anchoring. Watch NFTs come to life, see tokens floating in mid-air, and interact with digital objects as if they were truly there.
home.serviceAIPersonalizationDesc: Your AI companion doesn't just guide you, it sees what you see through AR, analyzes your environment, and provides real-time contextual insights. Imagine an AI that recognizes landmarks to reveal local food spots, suggests optimal walking routes based on your play style, and even generates personalized AR content on the fly.
home.serviceMoveToEarnDesc: Join massive live AR events where thousands of players converge for real-world meetups with digital rewards. Picture music festivals where exclusive rewards drop to attendees, sports events with location-locked collectibles, or city-wide treasure hunts with prize pools.
home.pathBlockchainDesc: Every NFT, token, and in-game asset is secured on the blockchain. That means real ownership, provable fairness, and rewards you can actually use — inside and outside SeekAR.
home.pathAIDesc: Our AI learns how you explore and play — giving you smarter location tips, personalized quests, and rewards that actually matter. The more you move, the better it gets.
home.pathProofOfLocationDesc: Every step you take is proof. Our system confirms your real-world location to unlock tokens, NFTs, and other digital assets— no cheating, just real rewards for real engagement.
home.builtToScaleDesc: Whether you're launching a project or exploring your city, Seek Protocol fuels your journey with immersive tech, verified presence, and real rewards.
home.scaleOnboardingDesc: Fast-track for users, creators, and businesses. From creating social wallets to first AR events — we make onboarding feel like play, not paperwork.
home.scaleProjectLaunchDesc: Whether you're a meme coin or a mission-driven project, plug into our AR, AI, and reward layers. Launch events, token spawns, or NFT quests — geo-based and gamified.
home.scaleBusinessPortalDesc: Local stores, global brands — onboard into the Seek ecosystem. Drop exclusive deals, location-based rewards, and drive real-world foot traffic with digital incentives.
home.scaleEngagementDesc: Referral quests, leaderboard streaks, and guild missions — a full suite of tools to drive daily, weekly, and social engagement across users.
home.scaleCrossPlatformDesc: Expanding across Solana Mobile, and Android/iOS. One profile, one wallet, endless Seek experiences — anywhere, anytime.
home.ctaDesc: Step into a new reality where the world becomes your playground. SeekAR transforms your surroundings into an interactive adventure, blending the latest AR technology with real-world exploration. Track down hidden treasures, collect valuable digital rewards, and conquer dynamic quests!

about.heroTitle: Discover the Future of Location-Based Digital Experiences
about.heroDesc: SeekProtocol transforms real-world exploration into rewarding adventures through advanced augmented reality and blockchain technology.
about.whyDesc: While others build apps, we're building a revolution. SeekProtocol bridges the gap between physical and digital worlds through location-based AR technology that turns every step into an opportunity. Our decentralized reward system ensures that exploration pays off – literally. We're not just creating experiences; we're pioneering a new economy where real-world discovery generates real value. With sub-meter precision tracking, stunning AR visualizations, and blockchain rewards, we're making the invisible visible and the impossible profitable.
about.valueLocationIntelligenceDesc: Precision geospatial technology with sub-meter accuracy that responds to your every movement in real-time.
about.valueARInnovationDesc: State-of-the-art augmented reality that seamlessly blends digital treasures with your physical world.
about.valueSocialDiscoveryDesc: Team up with nearby explorers for multiplied rewards and shared achievements.
about.valueCrossChainRewardsDesc: Earn multiple airdrops, NFTs, and other digital assets across different blockchain networks.
about.valueProofOfExplorationDesc: Verifiable on-chain records of your discoveries create a permanent legacy of adventure.
about.coreTechDesc: At SeekProtocol, we understand that exploration needs purpose. We don't offer one-size-fits-all experiences – we create dynamic, location-aware adventures for every user.
about.techGeospatialDesc: Real-time location tracking with dynamic geofencing that creates context-aware experiences.
about.techARDesc: Advanced rendering mechanics and spatial computing for immersive augmented reality.
about.techBlockchainDesc: Real rewards for real exploration & engagement.
about.techSyncDesc: Real-time updates across all players - see discoveries happen live as they occur worldwide.
about.threePillarsDesc: At the core of SeekProtocol are three revolutionary technologies that transform how we interact with the world.
about.pillarARDesc: Cutting-edge AR that reveals hidden digital layers invisible to the naked eye.
about.pillarLocationDesc: Sub-meter accurate GPS with dynamic geofencing that knows exactly where airdrops are placed.
about.pillarRewardDesc: Decentralized pools that ensure fair, instant, and transparent earnings for every SeekAR user.
about.approachDesc: Every location has untold value. Our job? To unlock it in ways that captivate, reward, and keep seekers coming back for more.
about.approachEventsDesc: Time-limited community events that bring the mass together, imagine Pokémon-Go Raids, Web3 style.
about.ctaDesc: Step into a new reality where the world becomes your playground. SeekAR transforms your surroundings into an interactive adventure, blending the latest AR technology with real-world exploration.

contact.formDesc: Fill out the form below, and we'll get back to you ASAP.

services.businessStrategyDesc: Tailored strategies that align business goals with digital growth.
services.visualDirectionDesc: We create cohesive and timeless brand identities that capture your vision.
services.websiteCreationDesc: Fully responsive websites built with speed and elegance in mind.
services.contentSolutionsDesc: Capture attention and drive growth with strong content direction.
services.campaignExecutionDesc: Launch high-performance marketing across digital channels and platforms.
services.uiuxSystemsDesc: Design seamless, functional user journeys across devices and flows.
services.growthTacticsDesc: Strategic methods designed to elevate brand visibility and scale.
services.copywritingDesc: We create cohesive and timeless brand identities that capture your vision.
services.pricingDesc: We understand that each business has a unique budget, which is why our pricing is based on the module you select.
